results.title: Marengo attorney Jack Franks named to state bar association panel
results.description: The Illinois State Bar Association has appointed Marengo attorney Jack Franks to its committee that evaluates judges.

results.title: Finally! Court Rules Texas Can Bar Illegals From Getting In-State Tuition * The Gateway Pundit * by Seth Segal
results.description: As reported many times here at The Gateway Pundit, many schools have offered in-state tuition to illegal aliens in violation of federal law. Now, according to The College Fix ,”Texas can continue to prohibit illegal immigrants from receiving in-state tuition rates at public universities, a federal court affirmed.” “The ruling last Thursday by a three-judge [...] The post Finally! Court Rules Texas Can Bar Illegals From Getting In-State Tuition * The Gateway Pundit * by Seth Segal appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Williams über Englands WM-Problem: «Lösen, bevor ich sterbe»
results.description: Vor dem WM-Finale singt Robbie Williams. Doch seine Engländer dürfen mal wieder nicht um den goldenen Pokal spielen - das setzt dem Popstar zu, wie er in einer emotionalen Ansprache im TV erklärte.

results.title: Polymarket odds put Lula at 59.5% in Brazil race after 10-point jump
results.description: After President Donald Trump’s televised address revived 2020 election claims, a report highlights conflicting answers from Energy Secretary Chris Wright and DNI nominee Jay Clayton, despite audits (Read More)
